title: Xtra Velvety Dutch Manchego Pasta
description: A rich and creamy vegan pasta dish featuring manchego cheese, served in individual mini cocottes, perfect for a brunch mood. This dish is a creative twist on traditional Dutch cuisine.
instructions: Cook the pasta according to package instructions, reserving 1 cup of pasta water.
In a blender, combine the manchego cheese, olive oil, onion, garlic, nutritional yeast, and lemon juice, blending until smooth.
Add the reserved pasta water to the blender, blending until a creamy emulsion forms.
Combine the cooked pasta and cheese emulsion in a bowl, tossing until the pasta is well coated.
Divide the pasta among individual mini cocottes.
Bake the pasta in the preheated oven for 15 minutes, or until heated through.
Serve the pasta hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
